notes:
v1.9.0 Update
✨ New Features:
• New Theme — Cleave: Aggressive crack lines tear across the screen. Character emerges through a slash that splits open from the center.
• New Theme — Eclipse: Celestial eclipse motif with golden corona ring, radiating light rays, and slow character reveal from black silhouette to full color.
• Video Audio Toggle: Unmute main character video and per-layer video audio with independent toggles.
• Video Loop Toggle: Disable main character video loop for one-shot animations.
• Custom Vote Button Sound: All-Out Attack vote button click sound is now customizable per preset.

🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Background dimming slider (0–100%) now works correctly.
• Video elements properly cleaned up when cut-ins end (was leaking GPU/CPU).
• Layer loop checkbox now syncs properly in preview.

announcement.title: 🎬 Cinematic Cut-ins v1.9.0
announcement.content:
v1.9.0 — Cleave & Eclipse Themes, Video Audio & Dimming Fix

  • ⚔️ Cleave: Aggressive crack lines + slash reveal from darkness.
  • 🌑 Eclipse: Celestial boss entrance with golden corona and slow silhouette reveal.
  • 🔊 Video Audio: Unmute character & layer videos independently.
  • 🐛 Dimming Fix: Background dimming slider now actually works.
